hypothesis: Systems-optimizer recovery becomes safer if a non-null state.active_hypothesis must resolve to one seeded backlog card and retain the exact bounded contract fields, so interrupted ratchets cannot resume with silent scope or proof drift.
measurement: Before the ratchet, `node CLAW/scripts/verify-systems-optimizer.mjs` only checked that a non-null `state.active_hypothesis` looked like a structurally valid card, so recovery could resume from an active slice whose `hypothesis`, `measurement`, `keep_rule`, `writable_scope`, `evaluation_bundle`, or XR/runner-specific fields had drifted away from backlog truth. After the ratchet, the verifier rejects any non-null `active_hypothesis` that does not resolve to exactly one seeded backlog item with an identical bounded contract, while the fixed scope-local promotion bundle stays green.
keep_rule: Keep only if a non-null `state.active_hypothesis` must stay backlog-linked and contract-identical to one seeded backlog card and the fixed scope-local evaluation bundle passes without touching route implementation paths.
learning_item: Non-null active_hypothesis must stay backlog-linked and contract-identical to one seeded card, or interrupted systems-optimizer recovery can resume with silent scope or proof drift.
